infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RPS Snip Snap Smash uses the camera to classify rock, paper, or scissors gestures.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RPS Snip Snap Smash uses the microphone for voice move input.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: RPS Snip Snap Smash uses speech recognition to turn your spoken move into gameplay.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RPS Snip Snap Smash lets you import an image for vision-based move prediction.
